summary: Frontend testing completed for UI changes. All requested modifications verified: 1) 'How Travito Works' section removed, 2) 'Confused About Visa' heading removed, 3) Self Apply card removed - only 2 visa cards remain (Explore Agents with 'Most Popular' badge, Assisted with 'Recommended' badge), 4) 3 action buttons relocated together (Travel Guide, Check Eligibility, Document Checklist), 5) Find Agents and Get Assistance buttons functional.

'Most Popular' badge on Explore Agents card
3 action buttons together: Travel Guide (purple), Check Eligibility (emerald), Document Checklist (violet)
